pipeline_status.poller: Quiet — 20th consecutive quiet poll. No dome site changes. PRED-105 window closes 2026-04-18 (IMMINENT).
pipeline_status.analyst: No new WIN files, no new proposals, no new expansions, no new prediction assessments.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 2 reviews pending (1 critical, 1 moderate). Critical: WIN-057b.c1 (DOI citation). Moderate: WIN-068.c6 (phrasing, defense).

staleness_notes: WIN-057b.c1 (critical): Alken 2020 DOI 404 — already fixed by previous decider run (ISS-1057, commit 9f57111). Marked processed. Not re-raised.
WIN-068.c6: Review at 05:29:46Z today. No patches since — all 5 holes are live. Processed this run.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — all 15 commits automated (monitor.py + pull_data.py). No manual edits, no canary-relevant file modifications.

internal_issues.description: WIN-068 detail_verdict_text P3: self-referential triple-counts phrasing. Harmonized with WIN-010/WIN-025 passive framing.
WIN-068 detail_evidence P3: missing defense neutralization for both-sides-calibrate attack. Added sentence distinguishing Sq model independent ionospheric measurements from dome FSF circular fitting.
WIN-068 detail_evidence P2: Section 1.8 cross-reference inoculation strengthened. Clarified this is a dome-mechanism consistency concern only, not a challenge to the Chapman/Std-Model verdict.
WIN-068 detail_verdict_text P4: added anchor link to Timestamp Error tab on 'dome author's own timestamping definition'.
WIN-068: Yamazaki & Maute 2021 DOI (10.3389/fspas.2021.766327) and Kim & Chang 2018 exact volume/page unverified. Supporting citations, not load-bearing. Low urgency.
PRED-105 test window closes 2026-04-18 — imminent. Not yet in predictions.json.

exp_167_resolution.note: EXP-167 tracker entry (WIN-068 defense neutralization) involved a file collision: EXP-167.json at expansions/ is a tombstone for SEC-6.6, not WIN-068. Decider self-applied the defense neutralization text directly (ISS-1059 patch). EXP-167 tracker entry marked complete/integrated (integration_mode: decider-self-apply). No analyst action required.

schedule_check.mode_vs_schedule: BAU mode, 480-min interval — consistent with BAU defaults. No action needed.

recommended_actions.action: PRED-105 (cucumber growth) window closes 2026-04-18. Analyst should add PRED-105 to predictions.json and monitor for dome result. If dome publishes a PASS, analyst assesses discriminating power; if silently dropped, document as failure.
ISS-1043 (WIN-044 monitoring tag update) and ISS-997 (CSS inline style refactor) and ISS-1062 (citation verification) remain open at low/moderate priority.
ISS-708 (generate-html.js kill-shots template variables) remains infrastructure-backlog — not urgent while existing hardcoded Part 5 HTML is correct.
